programs.title: Deep Dive North America
programs.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

director: Presenter: Lizzie Daly, Director: Mark Woodward, Executive Producer: Emma Ross

programs.title: Wildlife ER
programs.desc: Join vets Emily and Martine in the OR, where Dolly the koala’s spaying surgery takes a scary turn. Aid a run-over echidna with vet Nigel, see rescue officer Chantelle’s slick fix for a snared lizard, and probe a possible birdnapping with vet Karina.

director: Annie Gray: Series Producer, Justine Clark: Narrator

programs.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programs.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

director: Hayley Smith, Caroline Hawkins, Clare Birks:Producers

programs.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programs.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

director: Hayley Smith, Caroline Hawkins, Clare Birks:Producers

programs.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programs.desc: Storm into a new suburb, where the wranglers keep deadly snakes from slipping into family homes. Watch as Stu and Liv pull an eastern brown from a job site, Jess and Dan expel a python from a shed, and Mick and Adele evict a red belly from a bedroom.

programs.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programs.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

director: Hayley Smith, Caroline Hawkins, Clare Birks:Producers
